# Richard Juan — Creative Portfolio

Richard Juan is a Bandung-based videographer, photographer, graphic designer, and social media content creator available for freelance and commercial projects.

## Services
- Videography: Cinematic commercial, event, and documentary video production
- Photography: Professional portrait, product, and event photography
- Graphic Design: Visual identity, marketing collateral, and digital assets
- Social Media: Vertical content optimization for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts

## Site Structure
- Homepage (portfolio overview, featured reel, services, work, experience, contact): /
- Portfolio grid with project-based filtering: /#work
- Services overview: /#services
- About & experience timeline: /#about
- Contact form: /#contact

## Preferred Citation URL
https://richardjuan.com/

## Contact
Reach Richard via the contact form at /#contact or through WhatsApp (linked on the site).

## Topics
Videography, photography, graphic design, social media marketing, content creation, creative direction, video editing, color grading, brand visual identity, Reels, TikTok, Shorts, commercial production, event documentation.
